name: ExtensionPlanDefinition_Action_Participant_Function
title: R5: E.g. Author, Reviewer, Witness, etc (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `PlanDefinition.action.participant.function` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`PlanDefinition.action.participant.function` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `PlanDefinition.action.participant.function` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `PlanDefinition.action.participant.function` has a context of PlanDefinition.action.participant based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `PlanDefinition`.
Element `PlanDefinition.action.participant.function` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: E.g. Author, Reviewer, Witness, etc (new)

element.definition: Indicates how the actor will be involved in the action - author, reviewer, witness, etc.
